name: sudoku-app
description: A pure front-end Sudoku game with Android APK support

scripts.apk:debug: node scripts/sync-www.js && mkdir -p android-webview/app/src/main/assets && cp www/index.html www/app.js www/styles.css android-webview/app/src/main/assets/ && cd android-webview && ./gradlew --no-daemon assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: node scripts/sync-www.js && mkdir -p android-webview/app/src/main/assets && cp www/index.html www/app.js www/styles.css android-webview/app/src/main/assets/ && cd android-webview && ./gradlew --no-daemon assembleRelease
